items.title: Raksha Mantri congratulates General Phan Van Giang on his appointment as Deputy PM & Defence Minister of Vietnam
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Defence Raksha Mantri congratulates General Phan Van Giang on his appointment as Deputy PM & Defence Minister of Vietnam India looks forward to further strengthening longstanding defence ties with Vietnam: Shri Rajnath Singh Posted On: 09 APR 2026 9:42AM by PIB Delhi Raksha Mantri Shri Rajnath Singh has congratulated General Phan Van Giang on his appointment a…
